title: Web Developer
description:
**Project Role :** 
 Web Developer
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Design, build and test web\\-based applications for various site components and edit site content. Document technical designs and specifications. Research and incorporate updated content for websites.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 PySpark
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 3 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As a Web Developer, a typical day involves designing, constructing, and thoroughly testing web\\-based applications that support various components of a website. The role includes editing and updating site content to ensure relevance and accuracy. Additionally, the position requires documenting technical designs and specifications in detail. Continuous research is conducted to integrate the latest content and features into websites, enhancing user experience and functionality. Collaboration with team members and stakeholders to align web solutions with project goals is also a key part of daily activities.
   

  

 Roles \\& Responsibilities:
   

  

* Expected to perform independently and become an SME.
* Required active participation/contribution in team discussions.
* Contribute in providing solutions to work related problems.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to ensure seamless integration of web components.
* Maintain and update documentation to reflect changes and improvements in web applications.
* Assist junior team members by sharing knowledge and providing guidance when needed.


 Professional \\& Technical Skills:
   

  

* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in PySpark.
* Experience in developing scalable web applications using modern frameworks and technologies.
* Strong understanding of web architecture, including front\\-end and back\\-end integration.
* Ability to write clean, maintainable, and efficient code.
* Familiarity with debugging and performance optimization techniques.
* Knowledge of version control systems and collaborative development workflows.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 3 years of experience in PySpark.
* This position is based at our Kolkata office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.

title: DEVELOPER L3
description:
Job description:
   

  

 Job Description
 
**Role Purpose** 




 The purpose of this role is to design, test and maintain software programs for operating systems or applications which needs to be deployed at a client end and ensure its meet 100% quality assurance parameters
 


 ͏
 
**Do** 




 1\\. Instrumental in understanding the requirements and design of the product/ software
 


* Develop software solutions by studying information needs, studying systems flow, data usage and work processes
* Investigating problem areas followed by the software development life cycle
* Facilitate root cause analysis of the system issues and problem statement
* Identify ideas to improve system performance and impact availability
* Analyze client requirements and convert requirements to feasible design
* Collaborate with functional teams or systems analysts who carry out the detailed investigation into software requirements
* Conferring with project managers to obtain information on software capabilities


 ͏
 
 2\\. Perform coding and ensure optimal software/ module development
 


* Determine operational feasibility by evaluating analysis, problem definition, requirements, software development and proposed software
* Develop and automate processes for software validation by setting up and designing test cases/scenarios/usage cases, and executing these cases
* Modifying software to fix errors, adapt it to new hardware, improve its performance, or upgrade interfaces.
* Analyzing information to recommend and plan the installation of new systems or modifications of an existing system
* Ensuring that code is error free or has no bugs and test failure
* Preparing reports on programming project specifications, activities and status
* Ensure all the codes are raised as per the norm defined for project / program / account with clear description and replication patterns
* Compile timely, comprehensive and accurate documentation and reports as requested
* Coordinating with the team on daily project status and progress and documenting it
* Providing feedback on usability and serviceability, trace the result to quality risk and report it to concerned stakeholders


 ͏
 
 3\\. Status Reporting and Customer Focus on an ongoing basis with respect to project and its execution
 


* Capturing all the requirements and clarifications from the client for better quality work
* Taking feedback on the regular basis to ensure smooth and on time delivery
* Participating in continuing education and training to remain current on best practices, learn new programming languages, and better assist other team members.
* Consulting with engineering staff to evaluate software\\-hardware interfaces and develop specifications and performance requirements
* Document and demonstrate solutions by developing documentation, flowcharts, layouts, diagrams, charts, code comments and clear code
* Documenting very necessary details and reports in a formal way for proper understanding of software from client proposal to implementation
* Ensure good quality of interaction with customer w.r.t. e\\-mail content, fault report tracking, voice calls, business etiquette etc
* Timely Response to customer requests and no instances of complaints either internally or externally

**Deliver** 



**No.** 
**Performance Parameter** 
**Measure** 
 1\\.Continuous Integration, Deployment \\& Monitoring of Software100% error free on boarding \\& implementation, throughput %, Adherence to the schedule/ release plan2\\.Quality \\& CSATOn\\-Time Delivery, Manage software, Troubleshoot queries, Customer experience, completion of assigned certifications for skill upgradation3\\.MIS \\& Reporting100% on time MIS \\& report generation
 
  
 







 Mandatory Skills: Fullstack Java Enterprise .
 



  
 



 Experience: 3\\-5 Years
   

 .

Of yourself, your career, and your skills. We want to see the constant evolution of our business and our industry. It has always been in our DNA \\- as the world around us changes, so do we. Join a business powered by purpose and a place that empowers you to design your own reinvention.

title: Backend Engineer
description:
**Position** 
 \\- Backend Engineer
   

  

**Experience:** 
 5 to 7 years
   

  

**Primary Focus:** 
 Backend development, bug fixing, API/microservice development, production support
   

  

**Project:** 
 Overwatch, a NestJS/Nx monorepo with gRPC\\-based backend microservices
   

  

**Role Summary**
 We are looking for a backend engineer to work on an existing production\\-grade codebase involving NestJS micro services, gRPC APIs, PostgreSQL/TypeORM, Redis, Kafka, Neo4j, telemetry pipelines, device management, authentication, alerting, and API gateway services.
   

  

 The person will primarily work on fixing existing bugs, improving backend reliability, and developing new backend features. Since AI coding agents may be used, we do not expect the person to manually remember every syntax detail. However, they must be strong at understanding system behavior, debugging, validating correctness, and making sound engineering decisions.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Understand existing backend services and business flows across the monorepo.
* Debug and fix issues in NestJS/gRPC microservices.
* Develop new backend features in existing services such as auth, user, customer, device, discovery, telemetry, topology, alert manager, and HTTP API gateway.
* Work with protobuf contracts and ensure API changes are backward\\-compatible where required.
* Investigate issues across service boundaries, databases, queues, cache, and infrastructure.
* Write or update unit, integration, and e2e tests where appropriate.
* Improve logging, error handling, observability, and operational reliability.
* Work with PostgreSQL, TypeORM migrations, Redis, Kafka, Elasticsearch, Neo4j, and related backend infrastructure.
* Collaborate with frontend, DevOps, QA, and product stakeholders to deliver complete features.
* Document important technical decisions, API changes, and debugging findings.


**Required Skills**
* 5 to 7 years of backend software engineering experience.
* Strong experience with Node.js and TypeScript.
* Practical experience with NestJS or similar backend frameworks.
* Good understanding of microservices architecture.
* Experience with REST and/or gRPC APIs.
* Experience working with SQL databases, preferably PostgreSQL.
* Experience with ORMs such as TypeORM.
* Familiarity with Websockets/SSE.
* Ability to read and understand existing large codebases.
* Strong debugging skills across application code, database queries, logs, and distributed services.
* Familiarity with message queues or event streaming systems such as Kafka.
* Experience with Docker\\-based local development.
* Good understanding of authentication, authorization, validation, error handling, and API security.
* Ability to write meaningful tests and validate bug fixes properly.


**Good To Have**
* Experience with Redis caching.
* Experience with Elasticsearch.
* Experience with Neo4j or graph\\-based data modeling.
* Experience with telemetry, monitoring, network/device management, or infrastructure platforms.
* Experience with OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana, structured logging, or health checks.
* Experience maintaining protobuf/gRPC contracts.
* Experience using AI coding tools
* Domain knowledge in Networking


**What Success Looks Like**
* Bugs are fixed with clear root\\-cause understanding.
* New features fit naturally into the existing backend architecture.
* API, database, and service changes are tested and documented.
* The engineer can independently investigate issues across multiple backend services.
* The codebase becomes more stable and easier to maintain over time.

title: Software Engineer II
description:
**Job Description**
 The Enterprise Technology Services organization partners with every part of the American Express business to power the company’s growth and innovation with trust and efficiency, and drive competitive differentiation with speed. We support the delivery and operations of technology, digital, and data capabilities, platforms, and services globally. Specifically, our team is responsible for the company’s technology engineering, architecture, and infrastructure, providing 24x7 support to ensure an uninterrupted, high\\-quality experience for customers and colleagues. We also provide product management for core enterprise platforms, and lead technology risk and information security, enterprise data governance and platforms, digital product and design, and enterprise AI platforms on behalf of the company.
   

  

 Joining Amex Tech means discovering and shaping your contribution to something big. Here, you can work alongside talented tech teams and build a unique career with the Powerful Backing of American Express. With a range of opportunities to work with the latest technologies, and a commitment to back the broader engineering community through open source, our mission is to power your success. Because Amex Tech is powered by our technology, our culture, and our colleagues.
   

  

 The Technology organization enables and accelerates the company’s growth strategies, delivering global capabilities and services in support of Amex’s customers and colleagues, while maintaining 24/7 servicing and availability to ensure an uninterrupted, high\\-quality customer experience. Technology provides the foundation for everything we do in the company while driving differentiation through building and leveraging innovative technology and data insights.
   

  

 The Servicing Experiences Technology (SET) organization enhances Servicing Experiences by building smarter platforms with seamless automation and AI\\-driven insights\\- empowering Colleagues and Customers alike.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Contribute as an active member of an Agile development team, driving consistent engineering practices related to development standards, testing, documentation, and shared tooling.
* Design, develop, and maintain high\\-quality Java\\-based applications and services, dedicating most of the time to coding, unit testing, and automated test development within sprint cycles.
* Develop and optimize high\\-throughput data pipelines to improve system efficiency, reliability, and scalability.
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional engineering teams and stakeholders to deliver multi\\-system initiatives and platform integrations.
* Design, implement, and maintain CI/CD pipelines to support continuous integration, automated testing, and reliable software delivery.
* Develop automation frameworks for application build, deployment, and operational processes to improve release velocity and system stability.
* Build a deep understanding of system architecture and integrations across platforms within the supported business domain.
* Continuously refactor and improve code quality, maintainability, and performance while applying modern software engineering best practices.
* Identify opportunities to adopt innovative technologies, frameworks, and engineering approaches that improve developer productivity and system quality.
* Provide operational support for applications to ensure high availability, reliability, and performance in production environments.
* Collaborate effectively across teams to drive engineering excellence, influence technical decisions, and challenge the status quo with a continuous improvement mindset.
* Leverage modern developer productivity tools, including Generative AI\\-assisted development tools, to accelerate coding, debugging, documentation, and testing while maintaining high standards of code quality and security.
* Utilize AI\\-powered engineering tools to assist in code generation, test automation, documentation, and system analysis to improve engineering efficiency.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Systems, Engineering, or a related technical field (or equivalent practical experience).
* 5 \\+ years of professional experience in software development with exposure to modern development practices.
* Hands\\-on experience in Java development. asynchronous programming, including building scalable distributed applications.
* Hands\\-on experience in Python Development and contact center applications
* Experience working with NoSQL databases such as Couchbase and In\\-memory cache like Redis
* Knowledge Big Data Technologies, front\\-end technologies such as React is a plus.
* Hands\\-on experience with automated build and release management tools such as Git, Gradle/Maven, and CI/CD platforms like GitHub Actions.
* Strong understanding of software engineering fundamentals including code quality, testing, and performance optimization.
* Demonstrated ability to proactively identify opportunities for system improvements and technical innovation.
* Strong communication and collaboration skills with the ability to work effectively across teams and influence technical outcomes.
* Willingness to continuously learn and adopt new technologies, tools, and engineering practices.
* Familiarity with AI\\-assisted development tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, or similar) to improve development productivity and code quality.


**About Us**
 At American Express, our culture is built on a 175\\-year history of innovation, shared values and Leadership Behaviors, and an unwavering commitment to back our customers, communities, and colleagues. From delivering differentiated products to providing world\\-class customer service, we operate with a strong risk mindset, ensuring we continue to uphold our brand promise of trust, security, and service.
   

  

 As part of Team Amex, you’ll experience our powerful backing with comprehensive support for your holistic well\\-being and many opportunities to learn new skills, develop as a leader, and grow your career. Here, your voice and ideas matter, your work makes an impact, and together, you will help us define the future of American Express.
   

  

**About The Team**
 We back you with benefits that support your holistic well\\-being so you can be and deliver your best. This means caring for you and your loved ones' physical, financial, and mental health, as well as providing the flexibility you need to thrive personally and professionally:
   

  

* Competitive base salaries
* Bonus incentives
* Support for financial\\-well\\-being and retirement
* Comprehensive medical, dental, vision, life insurance, and disability benefits (depending on location)
* Flexible working model with hybrid, onsite or virtual arrangements depending on role and business need
* Generous paid parental leave policies (depending on your location)
* Free access to global on\\-site wellness centers staffed with nurses and doctors (depending on location)
* Free and confidential counseling support through our Healthy Minds program
* Career development and training opportunities


 American Express is an equal opportunity employer and makes employment decisions without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, veteran status, disability status, age, or any other status protected by law.
   

  

 Offer of employment with American Express is conditioned upon the successful completion of a background verification check, subject to applicable laws and regulations.

title: Lead Software Engineer – Platform Engineering (AI-Enabled Systems)
description:
iCliniq is a pioneering global healthcare technology company committed to democratizing access to world class medical care. Our mission is to leverage cutting\\-edge technology to ensure everyone, regardless of location, has access to top\\-tier healthcare services. By integrating innovative AI solutions and telemedicine, we bridge the gap between patients and healthcare professionals, delivering seamless, efficient medical care worldwide.
 



 iCliniq leverages artificial intelligence to enhance the scale, speed, and quality of digital healthcare delivery. Its platforms integrate AI\\-driven systems across patient triage, clinical content structuring, doctor\\-patient interactions, and operational workflows. These capabilities enable intelligent symptom analysis, automated medical data processing, contextual clinical assistance, and personalized health insights, while maintaining strict standards for data privacy, security, and regulatory compliance.
 



 AI at iCliniq is designed to augment, not replace, clinical expertise. Machine learning and NLP models are embedded into production platforms via well\\-defined APIs and services, enabling real\\-time inference, decision support, and continuous improvement via monitored feedback loops. The organization emphasizes robust engineering practices to ensure AI systems are reliable, explainable, scalable, and safe for use in real\\-world healthcare environments, aligning closely with its mission to make trusted medical guidance accessible globally.
 



**Role Overview** 




 As a Lead Software Engineer you will be responsible for designing, building, and scaling the core digital platforms that power iCliniq’s healthcare products. This role is an end to end engineering position, requiring a minimum of 3 years of hands\\-on Software engineering experience, with at least 6 months of direct experience developing and integrating AI agents or agent\\-driven systems into production platforms. You will work closely with AI engineers to integrate intelligent capabilities while maintaining strong ownership of platform architecture, reliability, and delivery.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 




**Platform \\& Engineering** 



* Lead the design and development of scalable, secure, and high\\-performance web platforms.
* Design and deliver full stack applications driven with AI
* Own end\\-to\\-end delivery of features from design through production deployment.
* Ensure system reliability, performance, security, and scalability.
* Enforce engineering best practices, including code quality, testing, and documentation.
* Mentor and guide engineers through technical leadership and code reviews.
* Collaborate closely with specialists.



**AI Integration \\& Collaboration** 



* Work hands\\-on on AI workflows, Agents and Data pipelines.
* Collaborate with AI/ML engineers to productionize AI models, including AI agents, and related services.
* Design and implement end\\-to\\-end agentic workflows, enabling autonomous multi\\-step task execution across production healthcare platforms.
* Participate in architectural decisions.
* Ensure AI integrations meet platform standards for performance, reliability, and security.



**Skill Requirements** 




**Core Engineering Skills** 



* Expert\\-level proficiency in ReactJS with TypeScript.
* Knowledge of python
* Strong understanding of NodeJS with TypeScript.
* Solid knowledge of GraphQL and its implementation.
* Experience in Astro is an added advantage
* Knowledge of microservices and modular monolithic architecture and design principles.
* Strong understanding of object\\-oriented and functional programming paradigms.
* Experience with DevOps practices and CI/CD pipelines.
* Knowledge of web security best practices.
* Experience with Agile methodologies and project management tools.
* Knowledge of Domain Driven Design (DDD).
* Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to lead and motivate a team.
* Experience in building scalable and maintainable web applications.
* Excellent problem\\-solving and debugging skills.
* Ability to work independently and manage time effectively.



**AI \\& Intelligent Systems** 



* Minimum 6 months of hands\\-on experience developing or integrating AI agents or LLM applications or agent\\-based systems in production environments.
* Practical experience in working with Gen AI.
* Experience building and deploying agentic workflows in production, including multi\\-agent orchestration, tool\\-use patterns, and human\\-in\\-the\\-loop designs.
* Hands\\-on experience designing and implementing LLM\\-as\\-a\\-Judge frameworks for automated evaluation, quality scoring, and continuous improvement of AI\\-generated outputs.
* Experience in integrating AI/ML models is added advantage



**Infrastructure** 



* Must have experience with any one of cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP).
* Practical experience in cloud preferably in GCP managed services.
* Understanding of CI CD pipeline and best practices.
* Good knowledge in securing web applications.



**AI native Software Development** 



* Practical experience in using AI agents for software development.
* AI powered development best practices.



**Collaboration \\& Leadership** 



* Technical leadership understanding modern AI SDLC.
* Guide technical discussions, decision making and taking up accountability
* Review AI\\-related integrations for maintainability, performance, and security.



**Qualifications** 



* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
* At least 3 years of professional software engineering experience in production systems.
* Proven experience leading complex software projects in production environments.
* Strong problem\\-solving skills and ability to balance platform stability with innovation.
* Critical thinking and Learnability is a must.
* Should be able to adapt to fast pace delivery environments
* Should be able to balance quality and delivery speed
* Must have a Growth mindset.

title: Back End Web Developer
description:
**About the firm** 




 Sikich
 
 is a global company specializing in Accounting, Advisory, and Technical professional services. With employees across the globe, Sikich ranks as one of the largest professional services companies in the United States. Our comprehensive skillsets, obtained over decades of experience as entrepreneurs, business owners and industry innovators, allow us to provide insights and transformative strategies to help strengthen every dimension of our clients’ businesses.
 



  





**The Agency at Sikich** 
 is a full\\-service marketing team that helps companies define and design their brands, promote their products and services, and engage with key audiences mainly in the U.S. Market. The Agency works with U.S. clients from a wide variety of industries – from manufacturing and consumer products to health care and management consulting. We dream up creative campaigns to help clients raise brand awareness, promote products and services, and build commercial momentum.
 



  





**Position Summary:** 




 Sikich is seeking a
 **Back\\-End Web Developer** 
 who will be responsible for building, maintaining, and optimizing the server‑side architecture that powers client websites and applications. This role focuses on developing scalable, secure, and high‑performing solutions across both traditional monolithic WordPress environments and modern headless architectures.
 



  





 The ideal candidate has strong experience with Next.js, headless architecture, API integrations, is comfortable working in API‑driven environments, and understands how back‑end systems support front‑end performance, content management, analytics, and SEO. They are a problem solver who collaborates closely with UX designers, front‑end developers, and strategists to deliver reliable and maintainable solutions.
 



  





**Job Responsibilities:** 




 The back‑end web developer will work closely with designers, front‑end developers, and project managers to support and enhance client digital platforms. Key responsibilities include:
 


* **Headless architecture development and support** 
 – Building and maintaining back‑end systems that support headless websites, including Next.js‑based front ends consuming data via APIs.
* **API development \\& integration** 
 – Creating and maintaining REST or GraphQL APIs, and integrating third‑party services such as CRMs, marketing platforms, analytics tools, and external data sources.
* **WordPress development** 
 – Supporting and extending WordPress‑based sites, including custom themes, plugins, APIs, and integrations.
* **Data management** 
 – Designing and optimizing database structures, queries, and data flows to ensure reliability and scalability.
* **Performance \\& security** 
 – Implementing best practices for application performance, caching, authentication, data validation, and security.
* **Collaboration** 
 – Working closely with UX, front‑end, and strategy teams to ensure back‑end solutions align with user experience, SEO, accessibility, and business goals.
* **Maintenance \\& troubleshooting** 
 – Debugging issues, supporting existing client sites, and continuously improving code quality and system stability.



  





**Requirements for a Successful candidate:** 



* 5\\+ years of professional experience in back‑end or full‑stack web development.
* Strong proficiency in
 **Next.js.**
* Experience supporting or building
 **headless CMS architectures** 
 , including Next.js‑based front ends. (e.g. Sanity.io, Sitefinity, other headless platforms)
* Familiarity with modern JavaScript frameworks and how they consume back‑end APIs.
* Experience integrating third‑party systems and services.
* Experience with
 **PHP** 
 and

title: Data Scientist
description:
**About The Company**
 Based in San Francisco, California, Turing is the world’s leading research accelerator for frontier AI labs and a trusted partner for global enterprises deploying advanced AI systems. Turing supports customers in two primary ways: first, by accelerating frontier research through high\\-quality data, sophisticated training pipelines, and top\\-tier AI researchers specializing in coding, reasoning, STEM, multilinguality, multimodality, and agents; second, by applying this expertise to help enterprises transform AI from proof of concept into proprietary intelligence. The company focuses on developing systems that perform reliably, deliver measurable impact, and generate lasting results on the profit and loss statements of their clients. Turing’s innovative approach and cutting\\-edge research make it a leader in the AI industry, fostering a collaborative environment that drives technological advancements and practical applications across various sectors.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced Software Engineers (SWE Bench – Data Engineer / Data Science) to join our team in a role that emphasizes benchmark\\-driven evaluation projects centered on real\\-world data engineering and data science workflows. This position involves direct engagement with production\\-like datasets, designing and maintaining data pipelines, and executing data science tasks to evaluate and enhance the performance of advanced AI systems. The ideal candidate will possess a robust foundation in data engineering and data science, with the ability to work seamlessly across data preparation, analysis, and model\\-related workflows within complex codebases. This role offers an exciting opportunity to contribute to state\\-of\\-the\\-art AI evaluation methods, ensuring the robustness and reliability of AI systems in practical applications.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The successful candidate should have at least three years of professional experience in roles such as Data Engineer, Data Scientist, or Software Engineer with a focus on data workflows. Proficiency in Python is essential, especially for data processing, analysis, and scientific workflows. Demonstrable experience working with both structured and unstructured data is required, along with a solid understanding of machine learning and data science fundamentals. Candidates should have experience navigating and modifying complex, real\\-world codebases, and be capable of writing clean, reusable, and well\\-documented code. Strong problem\\-solving skills are necessary, particularly in algorithmic or data\\-intensive problem domains. Excellent communication skills in spoken and written English are also essential to collaborate effectively with cross\\-functional teams and articulate technical concepts clearly.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Work with structured and unstructured datasets to support SWE Bench\\-style evaluation tasks, ensuring data quality and relevance.
* Design, develop, and validate data pipelines used in benchmarking and evaluation workflows to ensure efficiency and reliability.
* Perform comprehensive data processing, analysis, feature engineering, and validation to support data science use cases.
* Write, execute, and optimize Python scripts to process data and facilitate experiments locally, ensuring reproducibility and accuracy.
* Assess data quality, transformations, and outputs for correctness, consistency, and reproducibility to maintain high standards.
* Create clean, well\\-documented, and reusable data workflows suitable for benchmarking and evaluation purposes.
* Participate in code reviews to uphold high standards of code quality, maintainability, and scalability.
* Collaborate closely with researchers and engineers to design challenging, real\\-world data engineering and data science tasks that push the boundaries of AI evaluation systems.


**Benefits**
 Joining Turing as a freelancer offers the flexibility of working in a fully remote environment, allowing you to manage your work\\-life balance effectively. You will have the opportunity to engage with cutting\\-edge AI projects alongside leading language model companies, gaining valuable experience and expanding your professional portfolio. Turing provides a supportive and innovative work environment where your contributions directly impact the development and evaluation of next\\-generation AI systems. Additionally, you will enjoy the flexibility of setting your working hours within the specified commitments, making it suitable for professionals seeking adaptable work arrangements.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is committed to fostering an inclusive environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are dedicated to creating a workplace where all employees and contractors feel valued, respected, and empowered. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic. Our goal is to build a team that reflects the diverse communities we serve and to ensure equal opportunities for all applicants and team members.
